_comment: These 5 tar CVEs (<=7.5.9) come from expo@52 pulling in @expo/cli@0.22.x which requires tar@^6.2.1. Upgrading would require expo@53 (breaking change). Risk is minimal: the vulnerable tar.extract() is only called by expo prebuild to unpack npm registry packages (trusted source). Fix: upgrade to expo@53 when stable.
